# llmstxtscan.org

> Public information about the "llms.txt crawler bot" — a non-commercial research
> crawler that checks websites for a small set of standard, publicly-served
> "well-known" files (llms.txt, llms-full.txt, AGENTS.md, security.txt, robots.txt)
> to study their adoption across the web.

## About

- [Crawler information page](https://llmstxtscan.org/): what the crawler does, the files it requests, what it does not do, and how to opt out.

## The crawler

- User-Agent: `llms.txt crawler bot (+mailto:opt-out@llmstxtscan.org)`
- It requests only publicly-served well-known files, a small number of times, and does not scrape content, follow links, or bypass access controls.

## Contact

- Opt-out requests: opt-out@llmstxtscan.org
- General enquiries: contact@llmstxtscan.org
- Security: [security.txt](https://llmstxtscan.org/.well-known/security.txt)
